aries.horoscope_text: The general atmosphere of the day may seem too slow and stodgy for your tastes, Aries. Try not to get bogged down in details. Try not to worry too much. You may find that it's difficult to get any enthusiasm out of people today. You might just want to sit back and take it easy. This is a good day to plan and reorganize. Honor your recent achievements and consolidate all that you've worked for.
aries.deploy_today: No — the stars say plan and reorganize. Shipping is not reorganizing.
aries.prophecy: The stars say honor your achievements today. Jira says you have 3 overdue tickets. Jira wins.

taurus.horoscope_text: This is a terrific day for you, Taurus. You'll notice a sense of well-being that makes you feel secure that all your hard work is finally starting to pay off. It's as if you've reached a comfortable ledge in your trek up the mountain. This is a good resting spot that will let you catch your breath for a moment. Take this opportunity to relax and regroup.
taurus.deploy_today: Yes — hard work is paying off, energy is stable. Catch your breath after you push.
taurus.prophecy: Your hard work is finally paying off. Someone will notice. It will be in the bug report.

gemini.horoscope_text: Try not to be too fixed in your attitude today, Gemini. Realize that you may have to give a little in order to work comfortably with the people around you. It's important that you be slow and reserved in your moves, especially in matters of the heart. Be open and receptive. Try not to scare anyone away with abrasive words or insisting that you're always right.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — be open and receptive today. Especially to your reviewer's 14 comments.
gemini.prophecy: The stars say stop insisting you're always right. Your git history has receipts. 🙃

cancer.horoscope_text: There's a loving tenderness in the air that you'll find very comforting, Cancer. Ground your sensitive emotions and make room for love to enter the picture. It could be that you're feeling indecisive when it comes to matters of love and romance. The best thing for you to do is stabilize your emotions and then make the effort to connect intimately with another. The decisions will flow naturally from there.
cancer.deploy_today: Maybe — stabilize first, then decide. The ticket has been open since last sprint. And the sprint before.
cancer.prophecy: The stars say connect intimately with another. You have a 9am all-hands with 47 attendees. Close enough.

leo.horoscope_text: You may need to slow down a bit after the hectic pace of the last couple of days, Leo. It's essential that you take a more reserved and sensitive approach, especially with matters having to do with the heart. Try to ground and center yourself. Instead of thinking about conquering someone, try simply sitting back and receiving their appreciation and affection.
leo.deploy_today: No — slow down after the hectic pace. Your last 3 deploys remember the hectic pace.
leo.prophecy: The stars say sit back and receive appreciation. Your PR has been waiting for review for 5 days. Still waiting.

virgo.horoscope_text: You should notice a boost of energy today, Virgo, and your self-confidence should be revitalized. In matters of love and romance, everything is running smoothly. Your emotions are stable and grounded. Love and harmony are in the air. Take this opportunity to move toward the object of your desire with certainty and affection. Romance is in the cards for you tonight.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — energy up, confidence high, emotions stable. This is the window.
virgo.prophecy: Love and harmony are in the air. Your CI pipeline did not get the memo. 🔥

libra.horoscope_text: Take it easy today, Libra, and work to digest some of the input you've received over the past couple days. This is a day to contemplate and plan. With matters of the heart, you may find that a sensitive, grounded approach works best. This isn't always your favorite mode of operation, but it's one that will provide you with the balance to counteract your usual frenzied pace.
libra.deploy_today: No — today is for contemplating and planning. Not shipping.
libra.prophecy: The stars say digest all the input received. You have 47 unread Slack messages and a meeting in 4 minutes.

scorpio.horoscope_text: Anything having to do with love and romance is likely to go well today if you play your cards right, Scorpio. See what you can do to ground your fluctuating emotions. Try your best to bring them into balance. Take a practical approach and slow down. Communicating with groups of people will be extremely rewarding. Come out of your shell and show your sensitive side to the world. It will be greatly appreciated.
scorpio.deploy_today: Maybe — things go well if you play your cards right. Read the diff one more time.
scorpio.prophecy: Things go well today if you play your cards right. You will play the wrong card in the retro.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — your arrows fly true today. Aim carefully before you shoot to production.
sagittarius.prophecy: The stars say adventure awaits. Your backlog has been waiting longer. Your backlog wins.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: No — ambition is high but so is risk. The mountain can wait until Monday.
capricorn.prophecy: The stars say reach the summit today. Your Docker build has been running for 40 minutes. It's not at the summit.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — innovative ideas surface today. One of them will break staging. You know which one.
aquarius.prophecy: Revolutionary thinking is your strength. You will use it to refactor something that was already working.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — the currents are gentle but unclear. Not a deployment day. It's a documentation day. You'll deploy anyway.
pisces.prophecy: The stars say trust your intuition. Your intuition said the tests would pass. Your intuition was wrong.
